issues.description: Missing entire conditional logic. DSL must include: (1) reveal top deck card, (2) check if card has {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, (3) DrawCard and place card on top only if condition is true. Current DSL unconditionally draws 2 cards without any reveal or condition.
Missing action to place 1 card from hand at top of deck. No mechanism defined for this effect.

conditions.checkType: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
